dataset: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 69, export_result.sh lines 30 and 56, verifier.py checks pnotes table

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real NHANES patient data (9,375 real patients from National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey, sourced from LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr GitHub repository). Call details and ground truth are synthetically generated per task execution. File paths are verified: call_details.txt is created at /home/ga/Desktop/ and ground_truth.json at /tmp/. The target database table is pnotes (patient notes). However, the required_keywords metadata claim is contradicted: task.json claims ["lost", "losing", "bottle"] but the verifier.py uses ["lost", "losing", "miss", "gone"].
